name: imaging
description: A pure-Kirito image-processing library in the spirit of Pillow, built on the tensor standard library. Image class with PNG/PPM/BMP/JPEG codecs (JPEG encode via ffmpeg subprocess), GIF decode, conversions, geometry, point ops, ImageOps, convolution ImageFilter, ImageDraw, and an OpenCV-style VideoCapture (MJPEG/GIF/Y4M/image-sequence/HTTP-MJPEG natively; MP4/H.264/HEVC/AV1/RTSP/RTMP via ffmpeg subprocess). Public modules live in the img/ namespace (imported as `img/image`, `img/ops`, ...); internal codec + subprocess modules live in img/_*.ki under the same directory.
